artifacts.summary: Two-phase, ~1 hour nix hardening plan for the Logos section of modules/home/email/mbsync.nix. Phase 1 (high priority): add negative dotted-name patterns "!Labels/*.*" and "!Folders/*.*" to the logos-labels and logos-folders channels so no dotted mailbox name reaches the Maildir++ store (logos-folders is still in Group logos, which hot nvim keymaps run via mbsync -a). Phase 2 (low priority): add Group logos-full for on-demand full sync, then run home-manager build plus the user-gated live mbsync verification suite that also credits nvim task 851. Explicitly does NOT re-plan the already-landed a8f65ad group-slimming fix and excludes the secondary duplicate-UID / dateless-Sent data issues.
